Jwt._comment: All values below MUST be supplied via environment variables in production (Jwt__Key, Jwt__Issuer, Jwt__Audience, Jwt__Subject). Do NOT commit real secrets here.
Jwt.Subject: SmooothPixelAuth

Cloudinary._comment: Cloudinary credentials used by the backend for SIGNED uploads and the Media Library widget. Set Cloudinary__CloudName / Cloudinary__ApiKey / Cloudinary__ApiSecret via environment variables in production. NEVER put real values here in a public repo.
